name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 7 Jul 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.110"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in the Amazon integration where eParcel tracking numbers weren't sent to Amazon if they were updated through the Neto API."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in webstores where creating a customer account didn't show any password validation errors."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where you couldn't log into the control panel in a second browser, and end the original session."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
